name: Exosome / Extracellular Vesicle Isolation (Differential Ultracentrifugation)
nameCn: 外泌体/胞外囊泡分离（差速超速离心法）

components.name: 1. Culture cells in EV-depleted medium (48–72 h conditioned medium)

note.en: EV-free FBS: ultracentrifuge commercial FBS at 100,000×g 18 h 4°C; collect supernatant. Or use serum-free medium for last 24–48 h (lower contamination, lower yield). Volume: ≥50 mL conditioned medium needed.
note.zh: 去 EV 血清：商业 FBS 100,000×g 4°C 18 h 超速离心；取上清。或最后 24–48 h 改无血清培养基（污染少，产量低）。需 ≥50 mL 条件培养基。
沉淀 = 凋亡小体（弃去）。保留上清。

note.en: Pellet = large microvesicles/MVBs (200–1,000 nm). Can collect separately. Keep supernatant for exosome isolation.
note.zh: 沉淀 = 大型微囊泡/MVB（200–1,000 nm，可单独收集）。保留上清用于外泌体分离。

note.en: Removes residual large particles. PES membrane (low protein binding). Keep filtrate.
note.zh: 去除残余大颗粒。用低蛋白结合 PES 膜。保留滤液。

components.name: 6. Exosome pellet: 100,000×g, 70–90 min, 4°C (Ti-45 or SW-41 Ti rotor)

note.en: First 100k spin pellets exosomes (30–200 nm). Discard supernatant (cytosol + soluble proteins).
note.zh: 第一次 100k 离心沉淀外泌体（30–200 nm）。弃去上清（细胞质 + 可溶蛋白）。

components.name: 7. Wash: resuspend pellet in 10 mL cold PBS; 100,000×g, 70 min, 4°C

note.en: Removes contaminating soluble proteins. Repeat once more for higher purity.
note.zh: 去除污染的可溶蛋白。再重复一次可提高纯度。

components.name: 8. Resuspend final pellet in PBS or appropriate buffer (50–200 µL)

note.en: Pipette gently. Do not vortex. Store at −80°C (single-use aliquots) or use fresh. Avoid repeated freeze-thaw.
note.zh: 轻柔吸打重悬。不涡旋。−80°C 单次分装保存或新鲜使用。避免反复冻融。

note.en: MISEV2018 guidelines (Théry 2018): report at least 3 markers. NTA (NanoSight, ZetaView): size 50–200 nm, report concentration/mL. TEM: cup-shaped morphology. Negative markers: GM130 (no Golgi contamination), Cytochrome C (no mitochondria).
note.zh: MISEV2018 指南（Théry 2018）：至少报告 3 个标记。NTA（NanoSight、ZetaView）：尺寸 50–200 nm，报告浓度/mL。透射电镜：杯形形态。阴性标记：GM130（无 Golgi 污染）、细胞色素 c（无线粒体）。

notes.en: This protocol yields crude exosome preparation. For higher purity: further fractionate on iodixanol (OptiPrep) density gradient (top-loading, 40,000×g 18 h). Typical yield: 10⁹–10¹⁰ particles/mL from 50 mL conditioned medium. Alternative methods: SEC (size exclusion on qEV columns), precipitation (ExoQuick, fast but impure), immunoaffinity (anti-CD63 beads). All reported per MISEV2018 guidelines.
notes.zh: 本方案获得粗制外泌体制品。更高纯度：碘克沙醇（OptiPrep）密度梯度进一步分离（顶部上样，40,000×g 18 h）。典型产量：50 mL 条件培养基 → 10⁹–10¹⁰ 颗粒/mL。替代方法：SEC（qEV 柱分子排阻）、沉淀法（ExoQuick，快速但不纯）、免疫亲和法（anti-CD63 磁珠）。所有报告遵循 MISEV2018 指南。

ref: Théry et al. (2006) Curr Protoc Cell Biol 3.22.1; Théry et al. (2018) J Extracell Vesicles 7:1535750 (MISEV2018); Witwer et al. (2021) J Extracell Vesicles 10:e12080
